description_long: This is a sleek, modern coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a sharply contoured body. The exterior is finished in a glossy white paint, complemented by dark-tinted windows and a black roof panel. The front fascia features aggressive, angular headlights and a wide, sporty grille, while the rear is characterized by slim taillights and a subtle integrated spoiler. The car sits on large, dark alloy wheels with low-profile tires, enhancing its performance-oriented appearance. The side profile reveals two doors and sculpted side panels, emphasizing its coupe design. The interior, though not fully visible, likely includes leather seating and metallic trim, typical of high-end coupes.
description: A modern, glossy white coupe car with a low, aerodynamic body, dark-tinted windows, and sporty alloy wheels. Features aggressive front and rear styling with two doors and a black roof.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, sharp headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the coupe's two-door design, black roof, and large alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays slim taillights, integrated spoiler, and rear bumper details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe's sleek profile and window configuration.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
